compiled_state.title: Write structural test file for preplanning External Dependencies block reader sections
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Write a new structural test file at plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh that asserts:
1. The ## Phase 1.5: External Dependencies Block Reading section heading exists in preplanning SKILL.md
2. A reference to planning.external_dependency_block_enabled flag check is present in SKILL.md
3. The ## Refusal Gate section heading exists in SKILL.md (this test will fail RED until Task 2+3 add those sections)
4. The contract doc path plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md is referenced in SKILL.md
5. The manual:awaiting_user tag name is referenced in SKILL.md Phase 1.5
6. Idempotency check instruction is present in SKILL.md Phase 1.5

All tests execute grep/structural checks against the SKILL.md file and assert exit 0. Tests will FAIL (RED) before Task 2 and Task 3 add the sections.

Test approach (Given/When/Then):
- Given: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md exists on disk
- When: grep structural checks are run for each expected section heading/marker
- Then: each check returns exit 0 (section exists) — all fail RED before Tasks 2+3

File path: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh
Test function names:
- test_phase_1_5_section_heading_exists
- test_flag_check_reference_present
- test_refusal_gate_section_heading_exists
- test_contract_doc_path_referenced
- test_manual_awaiting_user_tag_referenced
- test_idempotency_check_instruction_present

Behavioral testing standard compliance:
- Rule 5 applies: SKILL.md is a non-executable LLM instruction file
- Tests target structural boundary only (section headings, referenced paths, tag names)
- NOT testing behavioral correctness of LLM parsing (non-deterministic)
- Exemption: Rule 5 / criterion 3 (static assets only / non-executable instruction files)

## Implementation Notes
- Create plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh following the same pattern as test_adversarial_review_prompts.sh in the same directory
- Set SKILL_MD="${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md"
- Use pass()/fail() helpers, PASS/FAIL counters, exit code summary
- chmod +x the test file after creation
- Update .test-index with RED markers before committing:
  plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh [test_phase_1_5_section_heading_exists]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_phase_1_5_section_heading_exists function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_phase_1_5_section_heading_exists' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_flag_check_reference_present function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_flag_check_reference_present' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_refusal_gate_section_heading_exists function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_refusal_gate_section_heading_exists' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_contract_doc_path_referenced function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_contract_doc_path_referenced' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_manual_awaiting_user_tag_referenced function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_manual_awaiting_user_tag_referenced' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_idempotency_check_instruction_present function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_idempotency_check_instruction_present' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh
- [ ] Running test returns non-zero exit (RED) before SKILL.md sections are added
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_phase_1_5_section_heading_exists] for plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
  Verify: grep 'test_phase_1_5_section_heading_exists' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test follows behavioral testing standard Rule 5 (structural boundary only, no content assertions)
  Verify: manual review — test file uses grep for structural markers (section headings, path names) only, not arbitrary prose content
- [ ] validate.sh passes (no new shim violations, no referential integrity breaks)
  Verify: bash .claude/scripts/dso validate.sh --ci 2>/dev/null | tail -5

comments.body: AC amendment: Add test_verification_command_or_token_instruction_present to the test file — this structural assertion checks that SKILL.md Phase 1.5 references both verification_command and a confirmation-token fallback for user_manual entries whose verification_command is omitted. Verify: grep -q 'verification_command\|confirmation.token' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md (covering DD2 completeness)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: AC amendment: Add test_refusal_diagnostic_references_brainstorm to the test file — this structural assertion checks that the Refusal Gate section in SKILL.md references /dso:brainstorm so the diagnostic correctly directs users. This complements T3's acceptance criteria but ensures the RED test drives this requirement. Verify: bash plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh; test $? -eq 0 (after T3 adds the section)
comments.author: Test
